title: Meibomia kurziana
taxonomy: Meibomia kurziana is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes or peas. This plant is native to India and is often found growing in the wild in mountainous regions. Meibomia kurziana is classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Desmodieae. It is a shrub-like plant with small white or pink flowers and is often found in association with other plants in its native habitat. Further classification of Meibomia kurziana may be possible through more detailed research or analysis.
